response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct performances in the video. Song 1 (00:00) is 'めちゃゴミ♡完全♡食!!' by 白石紫鈴, performed by Akai Haato. Song 2 (01:21) is 'Beautiful World' by Hikaru Utada, performed by Aki Rosenthal. \n2. Searched for lyrics for 'めちゃゴミ♡完全♡食!!' and 'Beautiful World'.\n3. Found official lyrics for 'Beautiful World' in both Japanese and English. Lyrics for 'めちゃゴミ♡完全♡食!!' were not found in a standard format, so marked as null.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring VTuber performances. The first song is "Mecha Gomi♡Kanzen♡Shoku!!" performed by Akai Haato, followed by "Beautiful World" performed by Aki Rosenthal.

scenes.description: Akai Haato performs the song 'めちゃゴミ♡完全♡食!!' on a neon-lit stage with backup dancers. Song credits appear in the bottom-center.
Aki Rosenthal performs 'Beautiful World (2024 Mix)' on a digital, grid-like stage. Credits appear at the bottom-center.
